title: Ayush Shetty Reaches Indonesia Open Pre-Quarterfinals, Prannoy Bows Out
indian_angle: Young Indian talent Ayush Shetty continues his impressive run at the Super 1000 event, while top Indian male shuttlers Prannoy, Rohan, and Gadde exited.
summary: Rising Indian shuttler Ayush Shetty fought back from a game down to defeat World No. 15 Hong Yang Weng of China, advancing to the pre-quarterfinals of the Indonesia Open. Meanwhile, HS Prannoy and the men's doubles pair of Rohan Kapoor and Hariharan Amsakar were eliminated.

title: India Invites EOI for Hosting BWF World Championships 2026
indian_angle: India is set to host the prestigious BWF World Championships in New Delhi, a significant milestone for Indian badminton.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has issued an Expression of Interest for organizing the BWF World Championships 2026, confirming India's role as the host nation for the premier global event in August.

title: The Psychology Behind Satwik-Chirag's Singapore Open Triumph
indian_angle: An insightful look into the mental fortitude and coaching strategies that propelled Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty to their recent Singapore Open victory.
summary: A deep dive into the mental approach and strategic guidance that underpinned Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty's impressive comeback and eventual triumph at the Singapore Open, highlighting their trust in the process and coaching staff.

title: Sindhu, Arjun-Hariharan Advance to Round 2 at Indonesia Open
indian_angle: PV Sindhu and the men's doubles pair of Arjun M.R. and Hariharan Amsakar secured their spots in the second round of the Indonesia Open.
summary: Indian badminton ace PV Sindhu and the men's doubles duo of Arjun M.R. and Hariharan Amsakar successfully navigated their opening matches at the Indonesia Open, moving into the second round of the Super 1000 tournament.

title: Satwik-Chirag Crowned Singapore Open Champions After Thrilling Final
indian_angle: India's top men's doubles pair secured a prestigious Super 750 title, showcasing their world-class form.
summary: India's star men's doubles pair, Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty, clinched the Singapore Open title with a dominant performance in the final, featuring furious rallies and their signature celebratory dances.

title: BAI Implements 3x15 Scoring for Domestic Junior Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring system aims to enhance competitiveness and development for India's young badminton players in national championships and ranking tournaments.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has announced the implementation of a 3x15 scoring system for domestic ranking tournaments and national championships across the U-13, U-15, and U-17 categories, effective immediately.
